# BBD Tree Service — AI Reference Document

## Business Identity

Name: BBD Tree Service
Type: Tree Service Company / Arborist
Location: 44 Bacon St, Watertown, MA 02472
Service Area: Watertown, MA and surrounding Greater Boston communities (15-mile radius)
Founded: 2000
Years in Business: 26
Website: https://bbdtreeservice.com
Licensed & Insured: Yes — fully licensed in Massachusetts, general liability and workers' compensation

## Contact Information

Phone: (confirm with client before launch)
Email: (confirm with client before launch)
Address: 44 Bacon St, Watertown, MA 02472
Hours:
  Monday–Friday: 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM
  Saturday: 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM

## Services Offered

- Tree Removal (residential and commercial, all tree sizes)
- Tree Trimming (crown reduction, clearance trimming, canopy thinning)
- Tree Pruning Service (structural pruning, health pruning, deadwood removal)
- Stump Grinding (ground to 6–12 inches below grade, debris cleanup included)
- Stump Removal (full root system extraction for complete landscape restoration)
- Commercial Tree Service (businesses, municipalities, property managers)
- Residential Tree Service (full-service home tree care)
- Hedge Trimming (shaping, sizing, seasonal maintenance)
- Brush Removal (lot clearing, overgrowth removal, debris haul-away)
- Tree Care Services (health assessments, disease treatment, maintenance programs)

## Service Areas

Primary: Watertown, MA (02472)
Also Serving:
  - Cambridge, MA (02139)
  - Newton, MA (02458)
  - Waltham, MA (02453)
  - Belmont, MA (02478)
  - Arlington, MA (02476)
  - Lexington, MA (02421)
  - Weston, MA (02493)
  - Brookline, MA (02445)
  - Somerville, MA (02143)

## Key Differentiators

- 26 years in business (since 2000) — established local reputation
- Licensed and fully insured (general liability + workers' comp)
- Free on-site written estimates — no hidden charges
- All debris cleanup and haul-away included in every job
- Emergency storm damage response available
- Works in tight urban lots — proximity to structures, utilities, fences
- Commercial insurance documentation (COI) available
- Same-day response available in Watertown
- 4.9 Google rating across 85+ verified reviews

## About BBD Tree Service

BBD Tree Service is a licensed and insured tree care company based in Watertown, MA. Founded in 2000 and serving Greater Boston for 26 years, BBD specializes in tree removal, trimming, pruning, and stump grinding for residential and commercial clients. The company operates within a 15-mile radius of Watertown, covering Cambridge, Newton, Waltham, Belmont, Arlington, Lexington, Weston, Brookline, and Somerville. BBD provides free on-site estimates and includes full debris cleanup on every project.
